activities.name: Stairs of West Queen Anne
activities.description: With Chris, Martha, Christine and Carol

activities.name: Baby’s first jog
activities.description: I am 4 weeks on from heart surgery, and I got permission from my wonderful cardiologist [strava://athletes/35557616/14]Tom Richardson to jog a little. Felt wonderful even if I could only go 100 yards at a time before walking. All in good time.

activities.name: Hawthorn Hills walk with Chris and Bean
2nd jog after heart surgery
activities.description: It’s easy to improve when you start at a very low baseline! First jog/walk was at 13 min/mile. This one was a little faster. Also got my heart rate up to a reasonable level.

activities.name: Each little jog is a little better than the last
Hills around Guadalupe
activities.description: We toured the famous monastery and saw the icon of the virgin in the morning, then set off for this ramble in the hills, getting back to our paradores just before the rain hit.

activities.name: Oak trees and water hazards
activities.description: After a visit to the Roman theater in Mérida

activities.name: Monfragüe National Park
activities.description: Morning on a sheep drovers trail through classic Extremadura oak trees, meeting a horse rider and very protective sheep dogs, then up a ridge into the park where we saw some cork-stripped oak trunks and down to a reservoir on the Tejas. Longest walk since my surgery. Tired afterwards, but no more so than everyone else!

activities.name: Pyrenean oak forest, and La Routa Del Emperador
activities.description: We walked from Charles V’s final home up through the Oak forests, and after lunch along the cobblestone route he was carried to get there

activities.name: Into Castile
activities.description:
A via pecuaria (livestock route) in the morning in northern Extremadura, then the old Roman road that became the Routa de la Plata into the kingdom of Castille.

(The straight line in the middle is a bus ride)

activities.name: La Peña de Francia down to La Alberca
La Alberca to San Martin del Castañar for Chris’ birthday
activities.description: Muddy at first, then a high granite plateau then lunch and finally into the town with its medieval bull ring.

activities.name: Around and above the Guggenheim
activities.description: Got to Bilbao this morning…. Raining solidly most of the day unfortunately. Half walk half jog
